description: Shift the three subtitle files (/home/ga/Documents/subs/en_original.srt, es_original.srt, fr_original.srt) by +12.5 seconds and multiplex them with the source video (/home/ga/Videos/documentary_final.mp4) into a metadata-tagged MKV container at /home/ga/Videos/release/documentary_multilang.mkv without re-encoding. The MKV must include the video, audio, and all three shifted subtitle streams tagged with ISO 639-2 codes 'eng', 'spa', and 'fra', with English set as the default track. Create a VLC XSPF playlist at /home/ga/Videos/release/spanish_review.xspf that loads the MKV, starts playback at 15 seconds, and forces the Spanish subtitle track. Generate a JSON stream manifest at /home/ga/Videos/release/stream_manifest.json outlining the MKV stream layout.
